_description: Delivery patterns Skillable supports — updated as new patterns emerge. Each pattern includes recognition signals and guidance for the AI.

patterns.name: Standard VM (Hyper-V)
patterns.guidance: Default path. Full control, predictable launch times, no cloud costs. Always prefer over ESX.

patterns.name: Standard VM (ESX)
patterns.guidance: Use only when Hyper-V cannot work. 4-5 points lower scoring. Broadcom licensing adds cost.

patterns.name: Container (Docker)
patterns.guidance: All four conditions must hold: container-native + browser access + no Windows + no multi-VM network.

patterns.name: Azure Cloud Slice
patterns.guidance: Provisions isolated Azure environment per learner. CSR (resource group) or CSS (subscription). ALL services supported after Security Review.

patterns.name: AWS Cloud Slice
patterns.guidance: Dedicated isolated AWS account per learner. Check supported services list. Permission boundaries for IAM-heavy products.

patterns.name: Azure DevOps (ADO)
patterns.guidance: Cloud Slice provisioning. ~85% launches <2 min, 15% take 5-15 min. Pre-Instancing mitigates. Self-paced only.

patterns.name: GitHub Cloud Slice
patterns.guidance: Cloud Slice provisioning. Inverse of ADO — ~85% slow (5-15+ min). Pre-Instancing required. Self-paced only.

patterns.name: Credential Pool
patterns.guidance: Pre-provisioned pool of real Entra tenants. Risks: recycling completeness, per-tenant license cost.

patterns.name: SSO Bridge
patterns.guidance: SSO bridge for products that require federated authentication. Account ban risk with no recourse.

patterns.name: Shared VM Infrastructure (vSphere)
patterns.guidance: Shared licensed ESX server with application-layer isolation. Broadcom licensing risk. Collaborative-only delivery.

patterns.name: OVA Import
patterns.guidance: Import to ESX fabric. Constraints: hardware version <=19, single VM only, ESX format required.

patterns.name: Custom API (BYOC)
patterns.guidance: Bring Your Own Cloud — use vendor's API for provisioning. Quality depends entirely on API coverage.

patterns.name: Simulation
patterns.guidance: For scenarios where real labs are impractical. AI Vision compute + platform overhead. Does not rescue the score — appropriate when all real paths are blocked.

security_add_ons.name: Conditional Access Policy
security_add_ons.requirement: Hyper-V VM + Entra P1 license. Not available on Cloud Slice.
security_add_ons.signal: Conditional Access, Zero Trust MFA configuration

security_add_ons.name: Keyboard Selector
security_add_ons.requirement: Non-English markets requiring language-switch for input.
